name: accordion
title: Accordion
description: Vertical stack of titled, collapsible sections with a focused-cursor model. Single-expanded by default; WithAllowMultiple opens independent sections.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Construct with New().WithSections(...). Up/down move focus, Enter toggles and emits SelectMsg with the section and the new Expanded state, Space toggles silently, Right/l expands, Left/h collapses, Home/End jump to first or last, Tab and Shift+Tab cycle the focus with wrap. WithAllowMultiple(true) opens sections independently; the default keeps only one section open at a time. WithSize(w, h) clips the rendered output and scrolls to keep the focused header on screen.
